title: stomoisia cornuta
intro: Stomoisia cornuta is a tropical plant species that belongs to the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the "loose-flowered gesneriad". The medicinal properties of Stomoisia cornuta include its use in traditional medicine for treating various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and calm irritated skin and mucous membranes. Stomoisia cornuta can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
